meaning: n.(流水的)汩汩声,欢乐的(咯咯声),(人发)咯咯声,汩汩地流vi.(流水)作汩汩声
examples: There was a gurgle of laughter on the other end of the line.
We could hear the swish and gurgle of water against the hull.
The fountain flows with a merry gurgle.
By dawn, I'd wake up to the soft gurgle of the fountain on the Place Edmond Rostand.
They gurgle, they smile, they talk and behave like cheeky school kids.
